summary: Resolved four review findings from run_1: (1) eliminated activePhases2 duplication at run.mjs:1627 by reusing the activePhases variable already in scope; (2) added !escalated && !reverted guards to the warning block at run.mjs:1532 to prevent double progress.md entries when terminal states co-occur with warnings; (3) strengthened both warning-path source-text tests into structural assertions that verify the writeFileSync guard excludes escalated/reverted and that the finalize-guard slice contains only 'escalated' and does not reference 'warning'. All 609 tests pass.
